I've been having an intermittent issue for the past week where the dashboard fails to load historical data older than 30 days. It started right after I updated the app to the latest version on both my desktop and mobile devices. Steps to reproduce: 1) Open the dashboard, 2) Select a custom date range spanning more than one month, 3) The loading spinner appears indefinitely and never resolves, forcing me to refresh the page. This happens consistently across Chrome and Safari, and I've already tried clearing my cache and cookies, restarting my router, and logging out and back in, none of which fixed it. I rely on this historical data for monthly reporting to my team, so this is becoming a significant blocker. Please let me know what additional information you need to investigate.
